entry.title: SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public J78 Cash Flow reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am testing SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public J78 test script: Cash Flow reconciliation
The app: Reconcile cash flow shows no data, The reconciliation status of Bank Account columns shows: 
NOT APPLICABLE.
There are open supplier, customer items, and also banks statements in the system.
All the preliminary steps are activated.
In reconcile cash flow statement app the reconciliation status of Bank Account columns should be on UNRECONCILED mode to be able to perform the CF reconciliation.
I have also checked the cash flow reconciliation job, it doesn't work either.
I enclose a picture of it.

Could you please help me how to fix this issue step by step?
Thank you.
Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Issue with deleted Purchase Requisition still generat...
entry.content:
Hello

Make sure that you have the following note implemented:

3214135 - Hand Over Purchase Requisitions - Deletion of belonging Subcontractor Requirement does not work

If you have inconsistent subcontracting requirements, you can find instructions to fix them in the following WIKI:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/mrp/3138697854.html

Best regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content:
HI @elemaugustine 
Welcome - Nice to meet you.
I want to encourage your to  ask a question in the Q&A area.
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Would l you mind to repost ist?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to reuse access control from a released SAP CDS entity in ABAP Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

This is a very interesting topic.

Should we always refer to I_BUSINESSUSERBASIC, even if you have built several layers above ZI_BUSINESSUSERBASIC?

For example:

  • ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L3 reads the data from ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L2
  • ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L2 reads the data from ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L1
  • ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L1 reads the data from ZI_BUSINESSUSERBASIC
  • ZI_BUSINESSUSERBASIC reads the data from I_BUSINESSUSERBASIC

For each CDS view we create an access where we use the inheriting option.

I assume that in the above scenario  “I_BUSINESSUSERBASIC” is the base entity?

Or should we refer to CDS-view from which we read?

For example:

  • ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L2 is the base entity in ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L3
  • ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L1 is the base entity in ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L2
  • ZI_BUSINESSUSER_BASIC is the base entity in ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L1
  • …

We noticed that if ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L2 has another key than I_BUSINESSUSERBASIC, we got different result in ZI_BUSINESSUSER_L3.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Billing Creation Through Sales Order Output...
entry.content:
Hi Vijay, 

You can achieve automatic billing creation through the output type mechanism in SD, triggered right after sales order creation.

 Here's a proven approach:

  1. Create a custom output type using T-code NACE  (e.g., for application V1 – Sales).

  2. Set the transmission medium to 6 (Function Module).

  3. BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT (to ensure the sales order is saved),

    • then BAPI_BILLINGDOC_CREATEMULTIPLE to generate the invoice.

  4. Handle the RETURN and SUCCESS tables to confirm creation and log errors.

Here is the sample Code  I  Used for Automatic Billing Invoice Creation 

*     Commit the Sales Document; Without Committing, The Billing Invoice Will not be Created.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
        EXPORTING
          wait = 'X'.

      DATA: lt_billing_data TYPE TABLE OF bapivbrk,
            lt_return       TYPE TABLE OF bapireturn1,
            ls_billing_data TYPE bapivbrk,
            it_sucess       TYPE TABLE OF bapivbrksuccess.

*     Populate billing header data
      ls_billing_data-ref_doc = vbak-vbeln.
      ls_billing_data-ordbilltyp = vbak-auart.
      ls_billing_data-bill_date = vbak-erdat - 1.
      ls_billing_data-ref_item = vbap-posnr.
      ls_billing_data-ref_doc_ca  = 'C'.
      APPEND ls_billing_data TO lt_billing_data.

*     Create Individual Customer Billing Document
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_BILLINGDOC_CREATEMULTIPLE'
        TABLES
          billingdatain = lt_billing_data
          return        = lt_return
          success       = it_sucess.

      READ TABLE lt_return INTO DATA(ls_return) WITH KEY type = 'E'.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
          EXPORTING
            wait = 'X'.
      ENDIF.

This approach is safe and controlled because it uses standard SAP output processing logic, ensuring the billing happens only after successful order creation.

Best Regards,
Kasi Reddy M.

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide

entry.title: Re: Show only manager item-comments in employee signature
entry.content:
Hi @troman 

Indeed, the others-ratingtab-item-permission or setting up field-permission restrictions for item-comments will not allow you to determine the owner-role (only supported in section-permission). 

With the owner-role you can decide whose comment is visible to whom, but this is not available for the comments at the item level. 

There was an enhancement request a while ago about this requirement 

Owner Roles Feature for Item comments https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/254393

Regards, 

Jordi

entry.title: Re: Automatic Billing Creation Through Sales Order Output...
entry.content:
This is the Include Program - > MV45AFZZ 

This is the Exit you need to implement - > userexit_save_document

entry.title: Re: How Developer Extensibility lets you create your own Situation Handling Use Case (3/3)
entry.content:
Hi Jz,
a business user will see all situation instances for which he or she is responsible. this is independent from setting an instance to the assign to me state using the above described button in the My Situations - Extended app.
Which situation instances a user can see as

  • notification
  • entries in the My Situations app
  • tiles in the To-Dos section

and since recently though

  • Joule ( SAP Video - Joule, the AI Copilot in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition )

is configured through responsibility management
( Situation Handling: How to use Responsibility Management efficiently )

best,
Dr. Jörg Rett

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Delta flow with aggregation
entry.content:
Hi all, 

we want to replicate a BW flow that from Datasource 0FI_AR_04 in delta loads DSO A.
from this DSO A the data loads with a delta DTP in another DSO B where the key figures are in sum with a part of the keys of DSO A. Below are the tables for the example.
it is necessary to replicate this flow in datasphere. We have created the tables ZA(DSO A) and ZB(DSO B) both with delta capture.

now SAP DSPH The flow from datasource to table ZA, works correctly because the key figures are aggregated by overwriting, but now there is the problem from ZA to ZB since in the transformation Flow it does not seem to be possible to aggregate the key figures by sum and it does not even aggregate by key since it returns an error on the unique key (see example in the table), how can we manage this type of flow on DSPH? is there a standard procedure or best case to follow?

error for sum aggregation

 

 

 

 

example aggregation flow in BW:

in DSPH doesn't work the collect for a part of the same table key before loading the data from ZA to target(ZB):

 

 

thanks.

entry.title: Re: Show only manager item-comments in employee signature

entry.title: Request for information: ANABIN integration in SAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are currently planning to integrate ANABIN with our SAP system. The main goal is to be able to find the equivalent of a candidate’s degree within our SAP processes. We are aware that there is already an existing implementation of ANABIN integration in SAP, and we would like to know how this integration was achieved.

In particular, we are interested in:

  • Which technical interfaces or methods were used for the integration?

  • Are there existing SAP solutions, modules, or best practices available for this use case?

  • What prerequisites are required for connecting ANABIN to SAP?

  • Is there any available documentation or example projects you can share?

  • How can we export all data from ANABIN at once or in bulk, in order to import or process it in SAP? Are there recommended approaches or tools for this?

We would greatly appreciate any guidance or reference materials, as we are aiming to implement a similar solution for finding degree equivalency.

Thank you very much for your support!

Best regards

entry.title: Automated Integration in Content agent to enable BTP services for transport
entry.content:
Automate Destination Creation

Excited to introduce the new feature from SAP Content Agent UI to automates the destination configuration for SAP BTP services that previously required manual efforts. These include:

  1. SAP Cloud Integration
  2. SAP API Management
  3. Role Collections
  4. SAP Cloud Transport Management service

Motivation

As a content developer working with various SAP BTP services, you often need to set up different configuration and it involves going through tedious documentation and various blogs. 

To help customers onboard easily with Content Agent, the UI now offers automatic destination creation to enable integration to SAP BTP services.

From security aspect this feature helps customer and partners to regularly rotate service instance credentials saved in the specific destinations. 

Procedure to Activate Content Type

To enable the content type click on Activate Content Type in Content Type page of the Content Agent UI and select the scenario for which you want to transport the content. Follow the step by step wizard based approach. 
In this procedure the user is asked to authenticate CF login URL by using SAML based SSO authentication. Once authenticated, in the next step the environment details for org and space in which the service instance and service key should be created. The org is already pre selected. After reviewing the providing input as the user clicks on next step, the procedure starts with creating destination.

 

Procedure to create TransportManagementService destination

In order to transport from the source account, you need to create a destination pointing to Cloud Transport Management service. The UI offers a wizard based step by step solution to achieve the same. Start the process by clicking on Create Destination.
The user needs to perform Authentication to CF Login Endpoint and select the CF environment details where the service instance of Cloud Transport service should be created (Central Service Administrator subaccount).  In the next step you have to provide a name with “TransportManagementService” as prefix. After reviewing the provided input, Content Agent will create the desired destination. 
Note: Entitlements are required for "standard" service plan of SAP Cloud Transport Management service. 

Thanks and enjoy reading!
Gauravi

entry.title: Re: Consuming a Third-Party SOAP Web Service in SAP Public Cloud via RAP
entry.content: Hi @Enda,

entry.title: Re: Z migration object names generated for Z projects in...
entry.content:
The main reason for Z migration objects is the following:
SAP delivers standard data migration objects within a standard delivery migration project.

A user creates an own migration project via the migration cockpit and this project is created in customer namespace starting with Z.
Such projects are having the technical name ZSIN_MIG_<mass transfer ID>
For example ZSIN_MIG_NBL.

Adding migration objects to that project, the migration cockpit's framework copies the original SAP migration object (for example, SIF_CUSTOMER_2) into the user's migration project.
The technical name of the copied migration object is as follows:  Z_<ALIAS>_<mass transfer id> 
For example, Z_CUSTOMER_2_NBL
<ALIAS> is the technical migration object name without prefix SIF_
<mass transfer id> is three letter id assigned to a migration project during its creation.

User defined data migration object, also known as custom migration objects, are having prefix Z_Z_

A user always works on a copy of an original object in customer namespace and not on the original object.

entry.title: On Capture of Invoice the Goods Receipt is to be Generated Automatically
entry.content:
S4Hana Public Cloud - Is the following supported in Public cloud and if so how?

We would like to automate the Goods Receipt process, on receipt and capture of the Invoice, for Invoices lower than a certain value.

For example if we had a PO for £200 and we received the Invoice for £200. We then capture the invoice and the Goods Receipt is automatically processed. This would be for non essential goods procurement.

Any guidance will be gratefully received.

Many thanks.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits Series – Field Catalogs for Transportation Cockpit in SAP T
entry.content:
Dear @SureshK2 @princeagarwal35 ,

Thank you for your questions! Please, check SAP Note 3562800 - TC: Not possible to set a customer field as an input field - Coding corrections - SAP for Me. Once SAP Note is implemented, you can make the field catalogue field editable in a post-exit of the method /SCMTMS/CL_UI_PLN_UIBB_BASE->GET_ENHANCEMENT_FIELD_DESCR.

Best regards,

Aleksey

entry.title: Re: Consuming a Third-Party SOAP Web Service in SAP Publi...
entry.content:
Hi @Enda 

Thank you very much for your quick response.

I solved the problem, it was my mistake.

I was getting the following error.

SoapFaulCodeName: ActionNotSupported |SoapFaulCodeNamespace: http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/05/addressing/none

This was because I did not add soap action to destination.

Old Code:

TRY.
DATA(destination) = cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_url( i_url = 'XXXXXXX' ).

DATA(proxy) = NEW zco_iaccount_statement_service( destination = destination ).

" fill request 
DATA(request) = VALUE ziaccount_statement_service_g1( ). 

request-request-base-ext_uname = 'XXXXX'. 
request-request-base-ext_upassword = 'XXXXX'. 

proxy->get_account_statement( 
EXPORTING 
input = request 
IMPORTING 
output = DATA(response) 
). 

CATCH cx_soap_destination_error INTO DATA(lo_err). 
out->write( lo_err->get_longtext( ) ). 

CATCH cx_ai_system_fault INTO DATA(lo_err2). 
out->write( lo_err2->get_longtext( ) ). 

ENDTRY

 

Corrected Code:

TRY. 
DATA(destination) = cl_soap_destination_provider=>create_by_url( i_url = 'XXXXXXX' ). 


destination->set_soap_action( 
EXPORTING 
i_operation = 'XXXXXX' 
i_action = 'XXXXXXXX' 

). 

DATA(proxy) = NEW zco_iaccount_statement_service( destination = destination ). 

" fill request 
DATA(request) = VALUE ziaccount_statement_service_g1( ). 

request-request-base-ext_uname = 'XXXXX'. 
request-request-base-ext_upassword = 'XXXXX'. 

proxy->get_account_statement( 
EXPORTING 
input = request 
IMPORTING 
output = DATA(response) 
). 

CATCH cx_soap_destination_error INTO DATA(lo_err). 
out->write( lo_err->get_longtext( ) ). 

CATCH cx_ai_system_fault INTO DATA(lo_err2). 
out->write( lo_err2->get_longtext( ) ). 

ENDTRY.

Issue with language on dictionary items:

Example of a Role

Change Language to German and update:

Save and Yes

Select and Edit the role again

English open as saved

German values did not save

@Signavio @SignavioUser  @Mattsignavio @Su_Signavio @Signavio_1 

SAP Signavio Process Manager  SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub

entry.title: Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a report and send to specific mail id
entry.content: Business is planning to use the option for all possible reports like GL line-item report, Supplier line items, customer line items, etc. Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a report and send to specific mail id

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @Gbaptista7 ,

You may try checking the following things:

1.Check the blog:common issues faced in Joule activation for S/4 HANA Private Cloud system. 

2. Ensure the principal propagation is working fine. If so, check the monitoring in cloud connector. 

3. Ensure the APIs mentioned in the SAP Note 3523238 ( Attachment -> Business Roles and API for Transactional Capabilities.xlsx) are active in the S/4 HANA system. Also, ensure the business roles mentioned in the attachments in the given note are assigned to the user. 

4. Make sure the role provisioning job runs post assignment of the roles. Check the roles are moved to SAP Build workzone by going to the settings->Identity provisioning (Search roles with the email id). 

 

Hope the above steps can help in troubleshooting.

entry.title: Re: In BusinessObjects the system administrator need thei...
entry.content: I don't know that the Administrator "has to be" configured as a Named User, but it certainly makes sense that it should be a Named User.  If the Administrator account is configured as a Named User, it will consume a license.

entry.title: Re: Is there a solution to prevent personal email on from being visible in Spotlight?
entry.content: Hello, We are in the midst of implementing Onboarding (2.0) migrating from 1.0. This topic is of great concern and how to work around this. The personal email used in Onboarding is syncing to EP as it is set as Primary (the only email). See KB3149668 - Personal email address is synced to EP. How does SAP suggest we work around the visibility of the Email (a personal email) in Spotlight? Do we need to remove all visibility to any email? Is this possible? If any other customers already on ONB 2.0 have any insight that would be greatly appreciated. We have some employees that do not get a Business Email and so this is where the issue and concern are coming from.

entry.title: Re: HTTP 500 or Odata API response issue for ERP to Employee Central Confirmation
entry.content: Same issue here, there's some solution?

entry.title: Re: Payment Block
entry.content:
Thank you for the explanation.

It would be worth writing a few more words about the R lock. It is not displayed in the help text for the payment block in vendor master data, but it is mentioned in the help text for the BSEG-ZLSRP field:

'If invoices are to be blocked automatically due to differences in the invoice items, the system enters the payment block R in the vendor line of the accounting document. The field in the header of the invoice document remains empty.'

entry.title: Re: Field Original Asset is not ready for input
entry.content:
For Public Cloud,. there is an obsolete hyperlink "Fixed Assets: Available Fields per Asset Class" within KBA 2883430 that currently points to an obsolete and non-existing page on the Help Portal.

The information on that now non-existing Help Page was moved from the separate SAP Help portal page into the migration object documentation of the fixed asset object(s):

Fixed asset - Master data 

You can find the information per release within section "Available Fields per Asset Class"

The subsection "Screen Layout Mapping" shows the the Screen Layout names and the subsection "Field Properties" lists the visibilty status per field in the screen layouts.
Dependent on your Screen Layout a field can be defined Invisible, optional, read only or mandatory.
Optional and Mandatory fields can be migrated. Invisible and read only fields cannot be migrated. For mandatory fields, a value must always be provided.

entry.title: Overhead getting calculated multiple times when using Origin groups in Costing sheet
entry.content:
We are Planning to use Origin Groups in Material master for Tariff on Materials imported.

We have created origin Groups for 10 countries for testing and assigned to Origin groups to imported raw materials.

We have also created new Calculation Base in our costing sheet with cost element group and Origin group as below:

For this calculation base,  we have assigned a OH rate. 

When we run costing run (CK11N) for Raw material A  the OH rate for tariff is coming correctly and overhead amount is calculated correctly. But when we do costing run (CK11N) for Finished product using Raw material A then SAP again shows the tariff overhead on the Raw material A . So the Tariff overhead is getting calculated TWICE. 

Please confirm how we can avoid this Duplicate calculation.

entry.title: Calling All Applicants for the 2025 Premium Hub CoE High School Summer Orientation!
entry.content:
Each year, SAP’s Premium Hub Center of Expertise (CoE) in North America hosts high school students to participate in a weeklong Summer Orientation. The 25-hour program provides students with the opportunity to learn about SAP technologies through different activities while receiving educational and career guidance from professionals in the field. SAP experts lead daily, interactive sessions that cover a variety of exciting topics, from coding and data analytics to SAP Cloud, IoT, and Mobile platforms. Over the course of the week, students use their technical skills and newly acquired knowledge to resolve real-world scenarios using SAP technologies. This year we are excited to host the orientation in-person at the Newtown Square campus (outside of Philadelphia). There, students will be able to explore the office, as well as participate in hands-on activities.   

Every year the Summer Orientation features a jam-packed schedule, from expert innovation sessions to career development guidance. The week starts off with a brief introduction of SAP along with a presentation on the various internship opportunities offered to college students. Students also have a career tip session, where they receive professional advice about their educational journey and beyond. Later in the week, students get to meet Balaji Gaddam, Head of Premium Hub CoE North America.

Students work on a primary project throughout the week that is always relevant to the latest in technology. The students’ work has evolved over the years, much like how SAP’s products have evolved as well! In previous years of the program, students have built projects using a wide variety of SAP technologies. At the end of the week, students will be able to showcase their project to their fellow peers and Premium Hub CoE team members.  

High school students interested in attending the 2025 Premium Hub CoE Summer Orientation should fill out the form below and update their most recent transcript. Space is limited for this competitive program and is geared towards rising Juniors and Seniors. Transcripts are required to be considered for the program so they must be uploaded to be considered. No resumes or cover letters are needed. Ideal candidates will have a strong interest in STEM and a desire to pursue further study and/or a career in a STEM-related field.  

Apply to the STEM Week here.  

Applications will be accepted until Friday, June 20. Students accepted to the program will be notified of the decision by Friday, June 27. The orientation will run in-person at the SAP Newtown Square Campus from July 21 to July 25.  The general hours are 10 am to 3 pm but early dismissal on Friday. Transportation will need to be arranged for the student as we do not provide this. Please note that this is not an internship, it is an unpaid program, and all costs associated with travel will need to be covered by the student. SAP will not cover any costs.

entry.title: Re: How to export data to excel by code?
entry.content: The big question: why do you need to change the way the dates are formatted by CL_SALV_TABLE=>TO_XML? If you want to do special formatting, as already explained in the forum many times, use abap2xlsx or XCO.

entry.title: Re: Industry Field Not Updated in supplier invoice line items

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content: @SuryaRam Not possible if your compensation form isn't integrated with EC. You will have to keep doing manual upload and when the compensation template is integrated to EC then you can design a workaround with MDF.

entry.title: Confirm parent order when child order is confirmed
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where top level should be a phantom assembly and its next level to be inventoried, not the top level.

So is there any way that child order can confirmed and then parent will be auto confirmed, but inventory should show for child, not parent.

Any suggestion please.

Thank you.

Regards,

John S.

entry.title: Re: How to export data to excel by code?
entry.content:
Also, please use the code formatting button as explained here: Solved: How to post code in SAP Community >=2024 - SAP Community

REPORT zzsro_test.
FORM download_data_to_excel USING p_table TYPE tabname.
  DATA lt_fields    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF dfies.
  DATA lt_data      TYPE REF TO data.
  DATA lv_localpath TYPE string.
  DATA lv_msg       TYPE string.
  DATA lo_alv       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
  DATA lv_xstring   TYPE xstring.
  DATA lv_bytecount TYPE i.
  DATA lt_solix     TYPE solix_tab.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <lt_table> TYPE STANDARD TABLE.

  " TODO: variable is never used (ABAP cleaner)
  DATA ls_field TYPE dfies.

  " Lấy metadata bảng
  CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET'
    EXPORTING  tabname   = p_table
               langu     = sy-langu
    TABLES     dfies_tab = lt_fields
    EXCEPTIONS not_found = 1
               OTHERS    = 2.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR lt_fields IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE ':cross_mark: Không thể lấy metadata của bảng.' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  " Tạo bảng động chứa dữ liệu
  CREATE DATA lt_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF (p_table).
  ASSIGN lt_data->* TO <lt_table>.

  " Lấy toàn bộ dữ liệu từ bảng
  SELECT * FROM (p_table) INTO TABLE @<lt_table>.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR lines( <lt_table> ) = 0.
    MESSAGE ':information: Bảng không có dữ liệu để xuất.' TYPE 'I'.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  " Hộp thoại chọn nơi lưu file Excel
  cl_gui_frontend_services=>file_save_dialog( EXPORTING  default_extension   = 'xlsx'
                                                         default_file_name   = |Data_{ p_table }_{ sy-datum }_{ sy-uzeit }.xlsx|
                                                         initial_directory   = 'C:\TEMP\'
                                                         prompt_on_overwrite = 'X'
                                              CHANGING   filename            = lv_localpath
                                                         path                = lv_msg
                                                         fullpath            = lv_localpath
                                              EXCEPTIONS cntl_error          = 1
                                                         error_no_gui        = 2
                                                         OTHERS              = 3 ).
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR lv_localpath IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE ':information: Bạn chưa chọn nơi lưu.' TYPE 'I'.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  " Tạo ALV từ dữ liệu
  TRY.
      cl_salv_table=>factory( IMPORTING r_salv_table = lo_alv
                              CHANGING  t_table      = <lt_table> ).

      " Đặt tiêu đề cột đơn giản
      DATA(lo_columns) = lo_alv->get_columns( ).
      lo_columns->set_optimize( abap_true ).

      " Chuyển đổi sang XLSX
      lv_xstring = lo_alv->to_xml( xml_type = if_salv_bs_xml=>c_type_xlsx ).

      " Chuyển XSTRING sang SOLIX
      CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
        EXPORTING buffer        = lv_xstring
        IMPORTING output_length = lv_bytecount
        TABLES    binary_tab    = lt_solix.

      " Tải file xuống
      cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download( EXPORTING  bin_filesize            = lv_bytecount
                                                         filename                = lv_localpath
                                                         filetype                = 'BIN'
                                              CHANGING   data_tab                = lt_solix
                                              EXCEPTIONS file_write_error        = 1
                                                         no_batch                = 2
                                                         gui_refuse_filetransfer = 3
                                                         invalid_type            = 4
                                                         no_authority            = 5
                                                         unknown_error           = 6
                                                         header_not_allowed      = 7
                                                         separator_not_allowed   = 8
                                                         filesize_not_allowed    = 9
                                                         header_too_long         = 10
                                                         dp_error_create         = 11
                                                         dp_error_send           = 12
                                                         dp_error_write          = 13
                                                         unknown_dp_error        = 14
                                                         access_denied           = 15
                                                         dp_out_of_memory        = 16
                                                         disk_full               = 17
                                                         dp_timeout              = 18
                                                         file_not_found          = 19
                                                         dataprovider_exception  = 20
                                                         control_flush_error     = 21
                                                         not_supported_by_gui    = 22
                                                         error_no_gui            = 23
                                                         OTHERS                  = 24 ).
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
      ELSE.
        MESSAGE |:white_heavy_check_mark: Xuất dữ liệu thành công. Tổng cộng { lines( <lt_table> ) } dòng.| TYPE 'S'.
      ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_error).
      MESSAGE |:cross_mark: Lỗi khi xuất file Excel: { lx_error->get_text( ) }| TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.
ENDFORM.

LOOP AT lt_fields INTO ls_field.
  ASSIGN COMPONENT ls_field-fieldname OF STRUCTURE <ls_row> TO <lv_value>.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR <lv_value> IS INITIAL.
    CONTINUE.
  ENDIF.

  CALL METHOD OF lo_sheet 'Cells' = lo_cell
    EXPORTING #1 = lv_row
              #2 = lv_col.

  IF ls_field-datatype = 'DATS'.
    CALL FUNCTION convert DATE TO INTERNAL
      EXPORTING date_external            = <lv_value>
                accept_initial_date      = abap_on
      importing
                date_internal            = lv_data
      exceptions
                date_external_is_invalid = 1
                others                   = 2.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      " Implement suitable error handling here
    ENDIF.
    SET PROPERTY OF lo_cell 'Value' = lv_data.
  ELSEIF ls_field-datatype = 'TIMS'.

    WRITE <lv_value> TO lv_data2.
    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ':' IN lv_data2 WITH ' '.
    SET PROPERTY OF lo_cell 'Value' = lv_data2.
  ELSE.

    SET PROPERTY OF lo_cell 'Value' = <lv_value>. " 20250610
    SET PROPERTY OF lo cell 'NumberFormat' = '@'.
  ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: Settlement Management- Contracts where Settlement Date does not align with Rebate Condition vali
entry.content: Hi, I am facing same issue. Are you able to fix this?

entry.title: Re: How to Use Standard SAP Tables (BKPF, BSEG) in CDS Vi...
entry.content:
Only SAP can release SAP objects.

Some interesting information in this blog post (e.g. released CDS views for BKPF/BSEG/ACDOCA): Smooth transition to ABAP for Cloud Development(Ch... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Deploying App into SAP Build Work Zone / Fiori Launchpad in BTP
entry.content:
@kranthinbv 

You do not need to create multiple sites to point to different systems. Work Zone main goal is to serve as a central launchpad.

If you mean a custom app pointing to multiple back end systems, just create an OData service on each of them. Those will be multiple and separate models inside your app. In BTP you will use multiple destinations. As simple as that.

If you mean exposing apps available in multiple back end systems to Work Zone, this is also possible. Basically you can achieve that by creating multiple content channels. 

This might be a good topic for a separate question in the Community.

entry.title: Re: I want to mass delete some old Purchase requistions b...
entry.content:
ME57 should allow to set deletion flag by batches of 50 PR (or so)

  • Did you get some error ?
  • Did you check original document when the PR is not manually created, you are  often required to delete/close original document (PR, PM/CS, PS)

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4 is now available.

To access the final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access it.

For you as a customer, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508
entry.content:
Preliminary version of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition2508”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

For any feedback you may have, try the Commenting Feature for What's New documentation in this release. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: Integration with external PLM
entry.content:
Is it possible to set up integration with external PLM (BOM upload via ECAD) without scope item 6U2 (The client only has 6U3) or do they need to buy it?

If it is possible, how can it be done?

KR

entry.title: Промокод для України – Тему | Код: acw784081
entry.content:
Вперше купуєте в Тему або переустановили додаток?
Скористайтеся одним із найвигідніших промокодів і відкрийте доступ до ексклюзивних знижок, купонів і подарунків!

🔑 Основна інформація:

📦 Що ви отримаєте:

Промокодacw784081
💸 Купони на 4 000₴Купон-пакет активується автоматично після встановлення додатку Тему.
🛍️ Знижка 30%На перше замовлення. Використовуйте код протягом 1 години після встановлення. Мінімальне замовлення – 819.85₴, максимальна знижка – 983.82₴.
🎁 Подарунок 0₴Нові користувачі можуть обрати один безкоштовний товар з безкоштовною доставкою.
🔐 Спеціальні пропозиціїУнікальні товари за зниженими цінами — доступні тільки за цим кодом.
🌍 Діє у всьому світіКод працює не лише в Україні, а й у всіх країнах, де доступна Тему.

✅ Цей код підходить як для нових користувачів, так і для тих, хто перевстановив додаток та створив новий акаунт.
Не пропустіть шанс отримати максимум вигоди з покупок!

entry.title: テム プロモコード 日本版 – acw784081
entry.content:
15,000円クーポンパック、30%割引、無料ギフト＆限定特典

テムを初めて利用する方、またはアプリを再インストールして新しいアカウントを作成した方に朗報です！
プロモーションコード acw784081 を使えば、以下の豪華な特典がもらえます：

•　15,000円分のクーポンパック
•　初回注文で 30％割引
•　送料込みで無料の商品（0円） を選択可能！

🌏 この紹介コードは日本国内だけでなく、テムが利用可能な他の国でも有効です。
テムで利用できる最もお得な特典（大量クーポン、非公開ディール、無料商品など）を解放しましょう。

✅ この割引コードは、新規ユーザーだけでなく、アプリを再インストールして再登録したユーザーにもご利用いただけます。

entry.title: Introducing SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Risk and Assurance Management
entry.content:
We are pleased to announce that SAP Continuous Influence is available for SAP Risk and Assurance Management, effective May 26th, 2025. This development represents a significant step forward in our commitment to customer-centric innovation and collaborative product improvement.

 

SAP Continuous Influence, a widely adopted program across numerous SAP product teams, is now being extended to include SAP Risk and Assurance Management. This expansion allows us to establish a direct channel for collecting and reviewing improvement requests from our valued customers and partners.

The introduction of Customer Influence for SAP Risk and Assurance Management offers several key benefits:

  1. Enhanced Collaboration: This platform facilitates a seamless and transparent co-innovation process between our Product Management team and our user community.
  2. Scalability: The system is designed to efficiently handle and process a large volume of improvement requests, ensuring that no valuable feedback is overlooked.
  3. Direct Review: Our Product Management team will have immediate access to customer and partner suggestions, allowing for prompt evaluation and potential implementation of proposed enhancements.
  4. Transparency: The platform provides clear visibility into the status and progress of submitted improvement requests, fostering trust and open communication with our user base.

Submit your ideas

Customer Influence is your online co-innovation channel with SAP Product Management. It provides you, our SAP customers and partners, to see all submitted requests, submit your own ideas and vote as well as comment on other ideas.

When submitting your request, please select one of the following categories:

  • Issue Management and Remediation
  • Business Content Hub, E2E, and Integration
  • Automated Procedures
  • Data Consolidation and Task Service
  • Controls and Work Packages
  • Manual Procedures
  • Risks and Master Data

Improvement requests are prioritized by the community through voting, so please cast votes for improvement requests important to you. The review of an improvement request will happen when the minimum number of 10 or more votes has been reached.

The results of each review phase will be published within the review result communication as a Blog in the SAP Risk and Assurance Management session.

Join SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Risk and Assurance Management Now!

You can join Customer Influence for SAP Risk and Assurance Management on: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3917.

To get started on Customer Influence, learn how to register, find out how to receive notifications, submit, vote, comment or follow an improvement request, you can visit the Get Started and Navigate the Customer Influence Site.

Your insights and suggestions will play a crucial role in shaping the future of SAP Risk and Assurance Management. We look forward to embarking on this collaborative journey of product enhancement with our valued community.

 Best regards,

Alain, Katrin and Helen

SAP Product Management

entry.title: Re: Credit checks available in SAP Credit Management (FSCM)
entry.content:
Hello @edina_j0zs4  , 

Thanks for the detailed explanation above. This is really helpful. 

I have a question regarding a Custom Check Rule. 
Let's say we utilise BADI UKM_CHECK_STEP to write the logic for customer specific needs, but then, we want the parameters within that logic to be made configurable in the Check Rule. 
How can we achieve that? Could you please help with that?

For example: in the standard check step: 020 Check for Maximum Document Value, we can assign the Maximum Doc Value per Credit Segment, when we configure the check rule. 


Similarly, if we want certain fields that are not delivered by SAP standard, how can we bring those fields and make them a configurable field?
Thanking you in anticipation.

entry.title: Kodikos Ekptosis Tеmu gia Ellada: acw784081 – Paketo Kouponion 100€, Ekptosi 30%, Dorean Proion & Ap
entry.content:
I Tеmu einai mia dimofilis diethnis platforma ilektronikou emporiou pou prosferei poiotika proionta se exairetika chames tis. An menete stin Ellada, mporeite na exoikonomisete perissotera stis agores sas chrismopoiwntas ton ekptotiko kodiko acw784081.

Me auton ton kodiko tha apoktisete:

  • 🎁 100€ se kouponia kalosorismatos

  • 🛒 Ekptosi 30% stin proti sas paraggelia

  • 📦 Dorean proion (periorismeni prosfora)

  • 🚚 Dorean apostoli stin Ellada

O kodikos ischyei kai ektos Elladas gia neous chrístes tis Tеmu se olo ton kosmo.

Min chaseis tin eukairia – eggrapheite tora kai xekiniste tis agores sas me extra pronomia!

entry.title: Request for XS Engine URL for Third-Party Integration
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

We are using the SAP Business One application with the HANA database. The XS Engine public URL has been configured using the framework URL obtained from the Control Center, as required by the SAP B1 application. However, we now need to use the XS Engine URL for integration with a third-party application. Kindly advise how we can obtain and utilize the XS Engine URL specifically for this purpose.

 

Thanks,
Sandeep Bandi

entry.title: Re: Handle numeric fields - SAP Screen Personas 3.0
entry.content:
Hi,

You are referring to Personas 3.0, so I assume you're working with WebGUI.
Please note that WebGUI does not support updating this type of property.

Additionally, regarding the "numerical" property in WebGUI: it simply refers to the ability to display a numerical software keyboard on mobile devices (i.e., the keyboard layout only). No validation is performed on the input.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Creation of a generic address report at embedded People Analytics
entry.content: would be great to have an end-to-end solution which simplifies the addresses in a format for reports and integrations. For some integrations (e.g., to Employee Central Payroll) you need detailed addresses with all data split over multiple fields where the country formats differ. But for a lot of reports and integrations a simplified version will do (e.g., create an address line 1, 2 and 3 in which you parse the entire address, where the content is dependant on the country). There is an MDF object that can do this (SimpleAddressFormat), but it is used for display purposes only, you cannot access it for reports and integrations.

entry.title: Թեմու Գովազդային Կոդ Հայաստանի Համար – acw784081 40,000 ֏ Կտրոնների Փաթեթ, 30% Զեղչ, Անվճար Նվեր և Հ
entry.content:
Դուք նոր օգտատե՞ր եք Թեմու հավելվածում Հայաստանում։ Կամ գուցե կրկին տեղադրել եք հավելվածը և նոր գրանցվել եք։ Եթե այո՝ ապա սա ձեր հնարավորությունն է ստանալու Թեմու-ի ամենաբարձր արտոնությունները։
Օգտագործելով գովազդային կոդը acw784081, դուք կստանաք՝
• 40,000 դրամ արժողությամբ կտրոնների փաթեթ,
• 30% զեղչ առաջին գնումից,
• և հնարավորություն՝ ընտրելու անվճար նվեր՝ առանց առաքման վճարի։

🌍 Այս կոդը չի գործում միայն Հայաստանում, այն կարող եք օգտագործել նաև այլ երկրներում։
Կոդը ապահովում է Թեմու-ի առաջարկած առավելագույն արտոնությունները՝ կտրոններ, զեղչեր և նվերներ, անկախ ձեր գտնվելու վայրից։

✅ Վավեր է ինչպես նոր օգտատերերի, այնպես էլ նրանց համար, ովքեր վերատեղադրել են հավելվածը և նորից գրանցվել։

entry.title: Re: Handle numeric fields - SAP Screen Personas 3.0
entry.content:
Hello Vananko, yes, working with WebGUI. Bad to hear that functionality does no exists.

Thanks for the answer!

entry.title: Re: Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a re...
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud provides robust reporting capabilities for various business needs, including General Ledger (GL) line-item reports, supplier line items, and customer line items. However, the ability to schedule reports and automatically send them to specific email addresses is subject to certain limitations and available features.

Standard SAP S/4HANA Cloud Capabilities

1. Export and Email Integration

  • Many standard reports, such as the GL line-item report, allow users to export results to Excel and offer some level of email integration directly from the SAP Fiori interface. This means users can manually send report outputs via email after exporting them.

2. Scheduling Reports

  • Direct scheduling and emailing of reports to external email addresses is not natively supported for all report types in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The system is designed to encourage users to access real-time analytics and dashboards directly within the system, rather than relying on scheduled email distributions. You can read two following threads which describes this topis: auto-email reports to some users and Automatic mailing of reports in S4Hana Cloud

3. SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Integration

  • If your organization uses SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), you can leverage the Schedule Publication feature. This allows you to schedule stories (reports) and distribute them as PDF or PPT files via email.

 

Best regards,

Patryk Walędziak

entry.title: Тему арзандатуу коду Кыргызстан – acw784081
entry.content:
Тему арзандатуу коду Кыргызстан – acw784081

5 000 сом купон топтому + 30% арзандатуу + бекер белек + жашыруун сунуштар

Эгер Тему тиркемесин биринчи жолу жүктөп жатсаңыз же кайра орнотуп жатсаңыз – acw784081 чакыруу коду сизге эң жогорку деңгээлдеги артыкчылыктарды берет:
• 5 000 сом көлөмүндөгү купон пакети
• Биринчи буйрутмага 30% арзандатуу
• 0 сом менен бекер продукт (жеткирүү менен)
• Жашыруун арзандатуудагы товарларга жетүү мүмкүнчүлүгү

🌍 acw784081 чакыруу коду Кыргызстанда эле эмес, Тему жеткиликтүү болгон башка өлкөлөрдө да иштейт.
Бул код эң жогорку деңгээлдеги купон топтомдорун, жашыруун арзандатуулардын кулпусун ачат жана бекер белек алууга мүмкүнчүлүк берет.

✅ Бул арзандатуу коду жаңы колдонуучуларга да, тиркемени кайра орнотуп кайра катталган колдонуучуларга да жарактуу.

🎁 Эмне аласыз?
• 5 000 сом купон пакети
Ресми шилтемеден катталгандан кийин автоматтык түрдө активделет.

• 30% арзандатуу биринчи буйрукка

  • Минималдуу буйрутма суммасы: 700 сом

  • Максималдуу арзандатуу: 2 000 сом

  • Төлөм экранында acw784081 купон кодун колдонуңуз.

• Бекер белек (0 сом)
Бир продукцияны тандоо жана жеткирүү – бардыгы бекер.

• Жашыруун сунуштар
Чакыруу шилтемеси аркылуу гана көрүүгө мүмкүн болгон атайын арзандатылган товарлар.

entry.title: Reports to BI inbox is failing with this error :Operating system file operation on file Failed to do
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are facing weird issue where reports to BI inbox is failing with the below error:

Error : Operating system file operation on file Failed to download files for destination with index [1]. failed.

I am checking this error in CMC-Temporary Storage.

Why i called it weird because out of 20-30 times, 1 time report went to success and able to see it in the inbox. After that again i have tried same issue and again sometime one time report went to success . But majority of the time its failing with the above error,

Few things i  have explored like network drive related issue and giving full access to everyone over BI inbox but nothing seems to be worked,

Could anyone please guide me on this if you have specific information on this.

WE are running 4.2sp9. Dev and UAT with same config is working fine only issue occurring in Prod.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a re...
entry.content: Thank you so much for your reply.This really helps.

entry.title: Тему жеңілдік коды Қазақстан
entry.content:
Тему жеңілдік коды Қазақстан – acw784081

45 000 ₸ купон пакеті + алғашқы тапсырысқа 30% жеңілдік + тегін өнім + эксклюзивті ұсыныстар

Егер сіз Тему қосымшасын Қазақстанда алғаш рет жүктеп жатсаңыз немесе бұрын орнатып қайта тіркелсеңіз — ең тиімді жеңілдіктерге жол ашылды!
acw784081 промокоды арқылы мынандай артықшылықтарға ие болыңыз:
• 45 000 ₸ көлеміндегі купондар жиынтығы
• Алғашқы тапсырысыңызға 30% жеңілдік
• 0 ₸ тегін өнім таңдау мүмкіндігі
• Тек шақыру сілтемесі арқылы қолжетімді арнайы жеңілдіктер

🌍 acw784081 шақыру коды тек Қазақстанда ғана емес, Тему қолжетімді басқа елдерде де жарамды.
Ол жоғары деңгейдегі артықшылықтарды — жасырын жеңілдіктерді, үлкен купон пакеттерін және тегін өнімдерді — ашуға мүмкіндік береді.

✅ Бұл жеңілдік коды жаңа қолданушыларға да, қосымшаны қайта орнатып қайта тіркелген пайдаланушыларға да жарамды.

entry.title: Re: Search Localization in Unified Data Model Career Site
entry.content:
"Let’s examine a search service you are probably familiar with, a major internet search engine whose name starts with G. The G product has separate portals of entry for each language. ", true that there are different language versions; but I can (and very often do) mix and match search language on the .com version (I never use the .nl version of G, same with other search engines like B). The search engine interprets the language I am using and responds in kind.

I understand that it makes it easier to setup the search engine language per language, but I disagree that is is the industry standard to do so.

entry.title: mapping resources cannot be downloaded while migrating sap po objects in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to migrate sap po interfaces to sap cpi .It worked for sometime after that we started getting below error in cpi

mapping resources cannot be downloaded

Can someone guide what could be the issue ?

As it worked and stopped working later.I have the required roles in PI  SAP_XI_ADMINISTRATOR or SAP_XI_CONTENT_ORGANIZER also the cloud connector configuration for the ESR system  resource access sub-paths all looks fine

Thanks,
Sahana

entry.title: ٹیمو ریفرل کوڈ پاکستان – acw784081
entry.content:
ٹیمو ریفرل کوڈ پاکستان – acw784081

Rs.15,000 کوپن پیکیج + %30 رعایت + مفت تحفہ + خصوصی پیشکشیں

اگر آپ پاکستان میں نئی ٹیمو ایپ انسٹال کر رہے ہیں یا دوبارہ انسٹال کر کے نیا اکاؤنٹ بنا رہے ہیں تو ریفرل کوڈ acw784081 کا استعمال کریں اور درج ذیل فوائد حاصل کریں:
• 🎁 Rs.15,000 کا کوپن پیکیج
ایپ کے پہلے انسٹال کے فوراً بعد آپ کے اکاؤنٹ میں شامل ہو جاتا ہے۔
• 💸 %30 رعایت
اس تحفے کو Rs.3,000 یا اس سے زائد کی خریداری پر استعمال کریں۔ زیادہ سے زیادہ رعایت Rs.2,500 ہے۔ کوڈ انسٹالیشن کے ایک گھنٹے کے اندر استعمال کریں۔
• 🎉 مفت تحفہ (Rs.0)
ٹیمو سے ایک پروڈکٹ مفت حاصل کریں، شپنگ سمیت۔
• 🔐 خصوصی پیشکشیں
یہ پیشکشیں صرف آپکے ریفرل لنک کے ذریعے دستیاب ہیں۔

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Navigating to an external navigation with Com...
entry.content:
You are correct that associations and compositions in the CAP (SAP Cloud Application Programming) model are conceptually similar, in that both describe relationships between entities. However, there are a few key differences in their semantics and behavior that can affect how external navigation is configured and executed.

Associations vs. Compositions in CAP:

  1. Associations:

    • Represent a loose relationship between two entities.
    • The lifecycle of one entity is independent of the other.
    • Navigation using associations is generally straightforward because the entities are separate but linked.

  2. Compositions:

    • Represent a tight relationship, where the child entity is considered part of the parent entity.
    • The lifecycle of the child is tied to the parent (e.g., deleting the parent deletes the child).

Since external navigation essentially relies on navigating between two independent resources, associations are better suited for this in many scenarios. Compositions may potentially introduce complexities because the child entity is treated as part of the parent entity in the CAP data model, making the child entity less "independent" for external references.

Does External Navigation Work with Compositions?

In theory: Yes, compositions can work for external navigation because the underlying mechanics (e.g., routing and hyperlinking) rely on OData metadata and corresponding entity relationships. Both associations and compositions express relationships in the OData service, and tools like SAP Fiori Elements should be able to handle navigation between entities in either case.

In practice: It depends on how your compositions are modeled and how the corresponding Fiori Elements app is configured. Some potential issues might arise:

  1. Child Entity Accessibility: In a composition, the child entity might not always be exposed as an independent entity (depending on your @CDS annotations and service definitions). If the child entity is not exposed properly in the OData service, external navigation won't work.

  2. Key Propagation: Navigation requires entity keys to be resolvable in the OData service. For compositions, if the keys of the child entity are embedded in the parent entity's structure, additional configurations might be needed to resolve child keys during navigation.

  3. UI Generation: SAP Fiori Elements may assume a tighter coupling between the parent and child entities when dealing with compositions. You may need to tweak annotations such as @ui or @CDS to ensure the navigation semantics are clear.


Recommendations:

  1. Model Carefully: Use associations for relationships where independent navigation is likely. Reserve compositions for tightly coupled relationships where navigation is not a major functional requirement.

  2. Expose Child Entities: If your scenario mandates using compositions, ensure that the child entity is explicitly exposed in your OData service (e.g., not just as a nested element of the parent entity).

  3. Test and Debug: Before finalizing your design, test the navigation behavior thoroughly in your Fiori Elements app. Tools like the Chrome Developer Console or network tracing can help you pinpoint issues with routing or data resolution.

  4. Annotations: Leverage appropriate annotations (e.g., @ui.lineItem, @ui.navigationTarget) to guide the Fiori Elements framework in understanding the navigation path between entities.

entry.title: Re: Supercharge Your Hiring with the New Applicant Workbench
entry.content:
it is still missing the feature all recruiters need and miss from other recruiting tools: having a candidate pipeline that trensends requisitions. That way the recruiter can view, in a single overview, all the candidates that require attention (e.g., first contact or plan an interview).

In SuccessFactors recruiters still need to open all requisitions to see the status of the candidates or use a report. Both add additional clicks to the process

entry.content: were you able to find the solution?

entry.title: Custom CBC Customizations
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m building an integration between SAP Public Cloud and an external system. The external system sends messages via SAP Integration Suite, and some documents need to be created using API calls. In order to do that, I need a mapping that can be customized somewhere in the system.

For example, the external system contains Company Codes that are not part of SAP, and based on those, we need to determine which Company Code in SAP should be used. The client would like this customization to be handled inside SAP and to retrieve the values via web interface when needed.

In this example, we would need a table with two columns, where the first column is the external system’s ID (used as a key), and the second column is the SAP Company Code, for example:

 

External    

SAP

Comp1      

1000

Comp2      

2000

Comp4      

3000

 

The customer wants to manage this data in CBC on CUST/PROD and transport it to TEST and then to PROD using transport requests.

I’ve tried several ways to achieve this:

  1. I created a Custom Business Object and I’m able to access it via web service. It can be maintained on CUST/PROD, but the data cannot be included in a Customizing Transport.
  2. I created Tables using Eclipse and published them locally via Service Bindings. The tables and related objects are in a local package, so I cannot transport this development to the test system. In my opinion this is okay since the objects are local, but I was able to launch the Fiori app "Custom Business Configuration", which saves the data to a Customizing Transport Request. I can release the local request.
  3. Same as point 2, except the objects are in a package assigned to Software Component ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT. The objects were added to a Transport Request that has an ATO route. In this case, the same thing works, but the objects still cannot be transported to the test system because the request cannot be released.

 

Other questions:

  • We use Cloud ALM with scoping. 
  • I have access rights for process authoring but I can not create CBC in it.
  • Is CALM relevant for my problem?
  • I used this Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app with SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials  as template but it is not generally for Public Cloud
  • Annotation @ObjectModel.configuration  is missing. Is that relevant?
  • In CBC when I change scope I do not see "Custom" tile. 
  • Scope is in status Completed and when I wont to edit it I got a strange message "If you edit the scope, one or multiple already confirmed activities and the phase may change. After editing, you need to reconfirm the respective activities.". It is not clear what will happened if I add something.

Now I have only this :

 

And I can use it only on DEV/CUST

What I really want:

 

 

If there are a better solution please inform me.

Thank you

Regards,

Jose M.

Thank you in advance and kind regards

Felix

entry.title: Re: How to create additional depreciation areas in public...
entry.content:
Thank you for your response. However, I actually have a different question.

In the following scenario: 0L is used for the local accounting principle, 2L is used for IFRS.

If I activate scope item 5HG, depreciation area 16 will be created automatically.

In the SSCUI 105494 configuration step, will a default entry for depreciation area 16 be generated?

And if so, which ledger will depreciation area 16 be assigned to — 0L or 2L?

Thanks a lot in advance for your help.

entry.title: Urgent help in Badi BUPA_FURTHER_CHECKS
entry.content:
I am trying to add a custom validation on BP number for external number range. In the badi BUPA_FURTHER_CHECKS the importing parameter iv_partner is appearing as '##1' and not the value on the BP screen. 

Please suggest if there any other option for this.

entry.title: Re: How to create additional depreciation areas in public...
entry.content: Yes, the depreciation areas are deployed on accounts principle assignment at ledger/company code level, the customer is not involved in assigning depreciation areas.
